name: Kiane Zawadi
abstract: Bernard Atwell McKinney, later Kiane Zawadi (November 26, 1932 – May 21, 2024) was an American jazz trombonist and euphonium player, one of the few jazz soloists on the latter instrument.

concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: Benny Carter and Illinois Jacquet

about_quotes.speaker: Barry Harris
about_quotes.evidence: I met a singer named Shirley Brown, and I met some musicians on the west side, Harold McKinney, Ray McKinney, Clarence McKinney, Bernard McKinney, who was Kiane Zawadi
about_quotes.doc_title: Barry Harris — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: David Weiss
about_quotes.evidence: Ronnie Mathews did it and Kiane Zawadi did it. And that concert was a success.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Weiss interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2022
